title: cyclocarya paliurus
intro: Cyclocarya paliurus, also known as the sweet tea tree, is a deciduous plant native to China, belonging to the family Juglandaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclocarya paliurus include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various diseases. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and it is also used in the production of extracts and supplements for medicinal purposes.
